narrative:
Cols 31-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,282 registered voters, with 77.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points.
